final_answer:
Bridge-only branding pass is implemented.

I updated branding-facing bridge content in `pos-portal`, `pos-contracts`, and `genesis-contracts`, including docs, package descriptions, user-facing labels, test labels/URLs, and genesis script/template naming. Key files: [pos-portal README](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/README.md), [pos-portal package](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/package.json), [deploy-live-bridge script](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-portal/scripts/deploy-live-bridge.mjs), [pos-contracts README](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/README.md), [DeploySystem script](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/script/setup/DeploySystem.s.sol), [MRC20](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/child/MRC20.sol), [genesis README](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/genesis-contracts/README.md), [generate-genesis](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/genesis-contracts/generate-genesis.js).

Checks run:
- `bridge/pos-portal`: `npm run build` passed.
- `bridge/pos-contracts`: `npx hardhat compile` passed.
- `bridge/genesis-contracts`: `npm run truffle:compile` failed because the project is currently configured with mixed compiler expectations and missing generated `BorValidatorSet.sol` pre-step (not caused by branding text edits).

Remaining old strings are now mostly intentional compatibility/migration internals, documented here: [BRANDING_EXCEPTIONS.md](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/BRANDING_EXCEPTIONS.md). Current blocker: full zero-legacy-string cleanup would require changing storage-slot keys and migration identifiers (protocol-impacting), which is beyond safe branding-only edits.
